'''鈭歯g-t-r''' ('''ngatara''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:stang|stang]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ng-t-r
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:stang|stang]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歯g-t-r
|-
! Lemma
| ngatara
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngatarithi|ngatarithi]] || [[word:ngatariji|ngatariji]] || [[word:ngatarishi|ngatarishi]] || [[word:ngatari|ngatari]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngataruthuth|ngataruthuth]] || [[word:ngatarujuj|ngatarujuj]] || [[word:ngatarushush|ngatarushush]] || [[word:ngatar|ngatar]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngataruthu|ngataruthu]] || [[word:ngataruju|ngataruju]] || [[word:ngatarushu|ngatarushu]] || [[word:ngataru|ngataru]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngatarufuth|ngatarufuth]] || [[word:ngatarufuj|ngatarufuj]] || [[word:ngatarufush|ngatarufush]] || [[word:ngataruf|ngataruf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngatarethe|ngatarethe]] || [[word:ngatareje|ngatareje]] || [[word:ngatareshe|ngatareshe]] || [[word:ngatare|ngatare]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngatarothoth|ngatarothoth]] || [[word:ngatarojoj|ngatarojoj]] || [[word:ngataroshosh|ngataroshosh]] || [[word:ngatar|ngatar]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngatarotho|ngatarotho]] || [[word:ngatarojo|ngatarojo]] || [[word:ngatarosho|ngatarosho]] || [[word:ngataro|ngataro]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngatarofoth|ngatarofoth]] || [[word:ngatarofoj|ngatarofoj]] || [[word:ngatarofosh|ngatarofosh]] || [[word:ngatarof|ngatarof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngatar忙th忙|ngatar忙th忙]] || [[word:ngatar忙j忙|ngatar忙j忙]] || [[word:ngatar忙sh忙|ngatar忙sh忙]] || [[word:ngatar忙|ngatar忙]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngatarathath|ngatarathath]] || [[word:ngatarajaj|ngatarajaj]] || [[word:ngatarashash|ngatarashash]] || [[word:ngatar|ngatar]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngataratha|ngataratha]] || [[word:ngataraja|ngataraja]] || [[word:ngatarasha|ngatarasha]] || [[word:ngatara|ngatara]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngatarafath|ngatarafath]] || [[word:ngatarafaj|ngatarafaj]] || [[word:ngatarafash|ngatarafash]] || [[word:ngataraf|ngataraf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:ngatarasha|ngatarasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gongatarasha|gongatarasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokingatarasha|gokingatarasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:ngatarn眉sha|ngatarn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gongatarnkn眉sha|gongatarnkn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokingatarn眉sha|gokingatarn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:ngatarsh毛sha|ngatarsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gongatarnksh毛sha|gongatarnksh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokingatarsh毛sha|gokingatarsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:ngatarosha|ngatarosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gongatarnkrosha|gongatarnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokingatarosha|gokingatarosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:ngatarmusha|ngatarmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gongatarnkmusha|gongatarnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokingatarmusha|gokingatarmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:ngatarsherasha|ngatarsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gongatarnksherasha|gongatarnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokingatarsherasha|gokingatarsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:ngatarngasha|ngatarngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gongatarnkngasha|gongatarnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokingatarngasha|gokingatarngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:ngataryasha|ngataryasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gongatarnkyasha|gongatarnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokingataryasha|gokingataryasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:ngataryamasha|ngataryamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gongatarnkyamasha|gongatarnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokingataryamasha|gokingataryamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:ngatarn眉sh毛sha|ngatarn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gongatarnkn眉sh毛sha|gongatarnkn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokingatarn眉sh毛sha|gokingatarn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:ngatarn眉rosha|ngatarn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gongatarnkn眉rosha|gongatarnkn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokingatarn眉rosha|gokingatarn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ngatarn眉musha|ngatarn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gongatarnkn眉musha|gongatarnkn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokingatarn眉musha|gokingatarn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:ngatarsh毛n眉sha|ngatarsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gongatarnksh毛n眉sha|gongatarnksh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokingatarsh毛n眉sha|gokingatarsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:ngatarsh毛rosha|ngatarsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gongatarnksh毛rosha|gongatarnksh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokingatarsh毛rosha|gokingatarsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ngatarsh毛musha|ngatarsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gongatarnksh毛musha|gongatarnksh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokingatarsh毛musha|gokingatarsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:ngataron眉sha|ngataron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gongatarnkron眉sha|gongatarnkron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokingataron眉sha|gokingataron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:ngatarosh毛sha|ngatarosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gongatarnkrosh毛sha|gongatarnkrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokingatarosh毛sha|gokingatarosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ngataromusha|ngataromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gongatarnkromusha|gongatarnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokingataromusha|gokingataromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:ngatarmun眉sha|ngatarmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gongatarnkmun眉sha|gongatarnkmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokingatarmun眉sha|gokingatarmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:ngatarmush毛sha|ngatarmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gongatarnkmush毛sha|gongatarnkmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokingatarmush毛sha|gokingatarmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:ngatarmurosha|ngatarmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gongatarnkmurosha|gongatarnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokingatarmurosha|gokingatarmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:ngatar|ngatar]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:ng忙t忙r|ng忙t忙r]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hongatar|hongatar]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hong忙t忙r|hong忙t忙r]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohongatar|hohongatar]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohong忙t忙r|hohong忙t忙r]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:n眉ngatar|n眉ngatar]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n眉ng忙t忙r|n眉ng忙t忙r]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉ngatar|n眉n眉ngatar]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉ng忙t忙r|n眉n眉ng忙t忙r]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:n茂ngatar|n茂ngatar]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n茂ng忙t忙r|n茂ng忙t忙r]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂ngatar|n茂n茂ngatar]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂ng忙t忙r|n茂n茂ng忙t忙r]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:lungatar|lungatar]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lung忙t忙r|lung忙t忙r]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulungatar|lulungatar]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulung忙t忙r|lulung忙t忙r]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:lingatar|lingatar]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:ling忙t忙r|ling忙t忙r]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilingatar|lilingatar]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:liling忙t忙r|liling忙t忙r]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kongatar|kongatar]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kong忙t忙r|kong忙t忙r]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokongatar|kokongatar]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokong忙t忙r|kokong忙t忙r]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kengatar|kengatar]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:keng忙t忙r|keng忙t忙r]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekengatar|kekengatar]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekeng忙t忙r|kekeng忙t忙r]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|dea8a94}}
